title: SurfaceRegistry
description: A signed, queryable registry of marketing/product web surfaces (domains and paths) with role, privilege boundary, default routing behavior, intent, and TTL. The single source of truth that RecommendationObject scopes resolve against.

id.description: Stable URN identifier for this registry snapshot.

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the contract this document conforms to.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp the registry snapshot was generated.

signature.description: Detached signature over the canonicalized surfaces array, or null if unsigned.

surfaceId.description: Stable URN identifier for the surface.

domain.description: Host the surface is served on, e.g. socioprophet.com.

role.description: What the surface is for, e.g. 'Canonical marketing entrypoint'.

privilege.description: Privilege boundary governing access and actuation.

intent.description: Primary intent served (e.g. brand, product, docs, education, regulated).

ttlSeconds.description: Freshness TTL for this surface entry in seconds.
